meaning: n.[体]法特莱克训练法(一种加速跑与慢跑交替进行的中长跑训练方法)
examples: Fartlek is a Swedish term that means' speed play 'or playing with speed.
To maintain your speed during the cold-weather months, do one fartlek workout every week.
Speed play (aka Fartlek) — Fartlek, commonly known in the U.S. as interval training, is the Swedish word for “speed play.”
